Decision rule: a corrective event is a feedback event whose latest judge verdict (role=judge, prompt_version=6, the cc_steer.export TRACES_QUERY basis eval-v2 was built from) is is_steering with category != 'direction'. Events with occurred_at strictly after 2026-07-10 accrue toward a +100-150-row corrective addendum, frozen on 2026-07-24 (+2wk) with its own sha manifest via the data.freeze_eval / eval_v2.py pattern. Zero leakage into eval-v2 by construction (time split at the freeze boundary). Purpose: out-of-freeze check for the S-c routing decision + power fix for the n=117 corrective positives. CID ($0, this counter): the projected freeze-day total from the current judged rate \u2014 projected < 100 \u21d2 the passive +2wk window alone will not deliver the power fix on schedule and must be re-scoped (extend window / broaden strata), not frozen underpowered. No spend; read-only; no mutation."}
